entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI: A Comprehensive Review
entry.content:
Hi JC,

your aim is to provide your client with a seamless and straightforward SSO/Multi-Factor Authentication scenario. It is about implementing MFA for their SAP S/4HANA system(s), whether it's through Fiori Embedded or in the Gateway (GW) is not crucial. What matters is that both access methods, DIAG/RFC using SNC (SAP Logon) and HTTP/TLS (ICM), need to be considered.

Your client is utilizing the SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI, which includes the SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS) as part of the package. Therefore, both solutions are always available with this new service.

To address your queries:

  1. You'll be utilizing the SAP Secure Login Client and X.509 certificates for logging into SAP Logon. For SAP GUI, this entails configuring S/4HANA for Secure Network Communication (SNC). The authentication token/method here is X.509 CBA (mTLS). For accessing all HTTP-based applications like ICF-Services (flp, etc.), SAML2 should be used. Authentication here also goes through the Identity Authentication Service (IAS), which can be the same as for the SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI (or another one if you prefer for some reason). MFA can be resolved via IAS or Corporate IdP here as well. This is the best practice. ALWAYS use SAP IAS for all SAP systems, whether On-Prem or BTP/SaaS. It's that simple.

  2. Authentication always occurs at the SAP IAS. It can handle various MFA methods from TOTP to FIDO2, but typically, this task is outsourced to a Corporate IdP, whichever is chosen, it doesn't have to be Entra ID.

Hope this clarifies things. Feel free to reach out again if needed!

Cheers Colt

entry.title: Change value of an attribute Inforecord Classification
entry.content:
Hello,

i want to change a value of an attribute for an inforrecord with classification (OKCODEPLANT & Type 057).

So I want to use the BAPI:

BAPI_OBJCL_CHANGE

My Import parameter was following: 

But this settings does not work.

In the table ausp I see the object key combination (lifnr & matnr). But it also does not work when i use this key instead of the inforecord number. 

Here you can see the maintenance view of my info record classification.

Can anyone help.

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect to Datasphere using the CLI
entry.content:
In my case, even though the Datasphere configuration specifies http://localhost:8080, it always opens https://localhost (without the ‘s’ and on port 80). I have to manually edit the browser URL to the correct one, press enter, and then it works.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: sort internal table descending not working
entry.content:
Hi,

 

SORT will basically work different, when you sort on a field which has a character data type. In your example, you have a character of length 10. Everything which is not fully used, will be added up with zeros in the end. Which will of course then put 9180 on top as it fills up the other spaces with zeros so '918000000'.

Either you enter the leading zeroes on front, or it won't work unless you change the data type of that field to numc for instance or an integer type.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Fiori App F1564
entry.content: Hi Edrilan,

entry.title: Re: Vendor Invoice Screen 'Payment' tab screen field 'DTW...

• Shouldn't the dynpro number be subscreens 0020 or 0520 of function group FDCB (SAPLFDCB)
  • Are those dynpros active at your enhancement point?
  • Did you try substitution rules or even one (free) of the BADI_FDCB_SUBBAS* BAdI?

entry.title: Re: Restful ABAP CDS metadata extension columns
entry.content:
I found the issue, in my current CDS there are BASIC, COMPOSITE, and CONSUMPTION

in the VBAP CDS, I putted the metadata extension in the VBAP Consumption view. I tried to put the metadata extension in the VBAP Basic view and it fix the issue.

But I don't know why the behavior of two CDS(Basic/Consumption) are different when it comes to metadata, putting the metadata to Basic view is working but if I put it in Consumption view its not working

entry.title: Automatic Update IT0008 ''TRFST'' Field Evey Year.
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirment to update "TRFST"(LEVEL) Field in Infotype 0008.

Every Year from the Start date the level should be decremented.

Eg: Start date ( Joining Date )= 01.07.2023 and Level = " 5 ". 

Next year i.e date from Joining Date : 01.07.2024 The level should be automatically changed to "04".

Is there any FM or something that will help me achive this?

 

Thanks & Regards,

Alex Dsouza

entry.title: Time off replication in H4S4 - available enhancements?

In our existing BIB configuration there is only the very basic A to B mapping available on absence replication with no ability to include logic or rules. 

Cheers

Brendan

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to download the object data from SAP SuccessFactors Territory and Quota via Express Data Loader
entry.content:
You can download data of the following SAP SuccessFactors Territory and Quota objects via Express Data Loader:

  • TerritoryAccount: The corresponding outbound file type is TERRITORYACCEXT
  • TerritoryGeography: The corresponding outbound file type is TERRITORYGEOEXT
  • TerritoryProduct: The corresponding outbound file type is TERRITORYPRODEXT
  • TerritoryQuota: The corresponding outbound file type is TERRITORYQUOTAEXT
  • Account: The corresponding outbound file type is ACCOUNTEXT
  • Geography: The corresponding outbound file type is GEOGRAPHYEXT
  • Product objects: The corresponding outbound file type is PRODUCTEXT
  • GranularQuota: The corresponding outbound file type is TERRITORYQUOTACELLEXT
The Outbound tab in Express Data Loader displays all the standard outbound file types:
 

 

Procedure

 

To download the object data from SAP SuccessFactors Territory and Quota via Express Data Loader:
  1. Download the sample input file templates (.txt files) from here and specify the standard attributes and custom attributes that need to be downloaded. Note that standard fields can't have spaces within the field name, because standard fields are read by their database field name.

    Example: Effective Start Date is a standard field. It must be populated without spaces as EffectiveStartDate.

  2. Specify the column and filter criteria as defined in the input file. The input files contain examples of the required select clause and where clause based on standard attribute columns, custom attribute labels, and reference objects.

    Example: To download Account data, you must use the ACCOUNTEXT.txt file. Sample data in ACCOUNTEXT.txt is as follows:

    accountId@Revenue@EFFECTIVESTARTDATE@Segmentation Group@ Segmentation Number@ Activation Date@Coverage Name,@Segmentation Group = "Global Sales" and @Segmentation Number = "10" and @Activation Date = "20211201"

    Note

    The uploaded input file must contain Select and Where strings separated by the Delimiter (Comma).

    In the previous example:

    • The SELECT string is as follows: accountId@Revenue@EFFECTIVESTARTDATE@Segmentation Group@ Segmentation Number@ Activation Date@Coverage Name

    • @Segmentation Group = "Global Sales" and @Segmentation Number = "10" and @Activation Date = "20211201"

      The WHERE string can be separated by logical operators such as AND, OR, etc.
    Note

    Fields that you populate in the input file for outbound extract are not case-sensitive. For example, AccountID, accountid, and ACCOUNTID are all considered as same field.

  3. Save the file with the following naming convention: <tenantid>_<outboundname>_<optionalstring>.txt.

    You must specify the tenant ID used by Express Data Loader, and must point to ACCOUNTEXT which is the outbound file type. The file name will then look as follows: WXYZ_ ACCOUNTEXT_TQACC2022.txt.

  4. To download the account data, you must upload the file in Express Data Loader > Jobs > Upload.
  5. Express Data Loader will then create the output file with the downloaded object data. The output file can be located at apps/localfiles/TenantID/outbound.

Refer to this spreadsheet for column-level guidance to the end user for all available SAP Territory and Quota outbound extracts.

entry.title: Re: New Machine Learning features in SAP HANA Cloud 2024 Q1
entry.content:
Hi Thomas,

for the next release update for SAP HANA Platform, 2 SPS08 we are currently assembling details about new features in the Predictive Analysis Library. The high-level planning will be published soon in the Road Map Explorer, it is likely we will be able to include this update. 

Thanks for your interest and best regards,

Christoph

entry.title: Re: Data Flows - The Python Script Operator and why you should avoid it
entry.content:
Great post.

One more thing about Python Operator, that must be considered in some scenarios: the python program is executed per each block of rows (block size is specified in Batch Size, but max is 100.000 rows per block) , so it is not possible to perform calculations that need to process all data together.

entry.title: Re: Use SAML Authentication on SAP BTP SDK Wizard for Android
entry.content:
Hi @Riyaz_abdul, 

 

You mentioned that you're using Cloud Build. Are you trying to build an MDK client, a customized MDK client, or an SAP Asset Manager application?

If you're building a custom application and don't need the onboarding process but just require the SDK for its other frameworks, you can simply utilize those frameworks, build the client in Android Studio, and generate the .apk file.

entry.title: Re: How to integrate Azure AD with SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment
entry.content:
Hi ,

Great blog. I have a small question :

1. If the user's role assignment is done in Azure AD group, does it mean there are no role assignment to be done in IAG or GRC system for this user ?

2. As IAG and GRC SAP systems does some checks before allowing users to be part of that Role. So should'nt these systems be used instead of Azure Ad group assignment which are mapped to Roles in SAP applications.

Please advice .

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales in SAP S/4HANA OP/Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi

It appears that 5D2 is not supported for MTO (Make to Order) scenario along with other restrictions as mentioned below.  Any idea when that will be available? 

  • Event-based revenue recognition does not support advanced intercompany sales with WBS (work breakdown structure) elements
  • Integration of IBP Response and Supply with advanced intercompany sales is not supported
  • The intercompany supplier invoice is created without an attachment, for example, the intercompany customer invoice is not attached as pdf file.
  • Sales bill of material (BOM) creating subitems
  • Advanced ATP creating subitems
  • Free goods creating subitems
  • Service Materials
  • Preliminary billing documents etc.

This means that we may need to stick with 1MX, From a future roadmap will SAP continue to support both 1MX and 5D2? Also many of the Documents and Notes are for versions 2022 and 2023. I am unable to find 2402 documents.

Can you please advise?

Jayshree

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales & Stock Transfer in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Gerhard

It appears that 5D2 is not supported for MTO (Make to Order) scenario along with other restrictions as mentioned below.  Any idea when that will be available? 

  • Event-based revenue recognition does not support advanced intercompany sales with WBS (work breakdown structure) elements
  • Integration of IBP Response and Supply with advanced intercompany sales is not supported
  • The intercompany supplier invoice is created without an attachment, for example, the intercompany customer invoice is not attached as pdf file.
  • Sales bill of material (BOM) creating subitems
  • Advanced ATP creating subitems
  • Free goods creating subitems
  • Service Materials
  • Preliminary billing documents etc.

This means that we may need to stick with 1MX, From a future roadmap will SAP continue to support both 1MX and 5D2? Also many of the Documents and Notes are for versions 2022 and 2023. I am unable to find 2402 documents.

Can you please advise?

Jayshree

entry.title: Re: New way to maintain settings in ABAP
entry.content: @shaisshow me your solution

entry.title: Planning of Business Entities (Universal Allocation, Internal Allocation, EC-PCA)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

My client currently uses business entities as the account assignment object in SAP ECC and intends to continue using them in S/4HANA. However, the universal allocation feature does not support this object ("business entity"). As a result, they will need to resort to classic transactions for internal allocations and then transport this data to ACDOCP for analysis. They are interested in leveraging new reporting options.

Business entities are planned before participating in internal allocations, acting as sender objects. To ensure data consistency, it's necessary to transfer data to Profit Center Accounting (1KE0) before internal allocation. This transfer typically relies on classic Profit Center Accounting (PCA), which they prefer not to activate.

Has anyone encountered a similar case? How can we harmonize data without activating classic EC-PCA?

Looking forward to your insights.

Best Regards,

Aleksei

entry.title: Re: SAP GTM-Error occured in Profit Simulation
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,

the error with regards to the financial documents occurs, because om item level in Sales I you have entered a Payment Guarantee Procedure but no Document number. This field is often preset and the presetting can be changed in the sales oder customizing.

entry.title: Personalization for tables in HTML Container for SAP UI5 application
entry.content:
Hi Team

I have an application with an HTML container and the content for this HTML container comes from the backend.

The content can have multiple tables and I am able to generate a custom button against each HTML table & handle the personalization at runtime by providing a custom dialog to user for columns selection & based on the selections, I would set/remove the "hidden" class against columns at runtime.

The problem now is that there could be some actions that could refresh the application. It means the application will fetch & load the HTML data from the backend and the user will have redo the table personalization again. 

Could you help how to persist the user personalization for this scenario?

I was going through some of the blogs that used iapp-state to achieve similar functionality but they would modify URL to save the iapp-state which I want to avoid as it affects the design of my existing complex application.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Wrong manager is receiving the notification for document routing.
entry.content:
Hi,

Wrong Employee received the mail notification which was generated after the document routed to next step in route map. Attaching the email received in the attachment.

Please note that there were two managers with same name however the employee IDs were different for them. So why the system is populating the mail to incorrect Manager in the email. Kindly confirm the root cause, also confirm how this issue can be avoided in the future.

issue in Requesters words: 

 As discussed in the call the user David Martin (438987), received the Document Routing Notice on Monday, Apr 15th for the SR form which belongs to another user David Martin (513255). The details are attached. The only common thing is their names, the e-mail addresses are different obviously. Could you please check how come the notification is sent to the wrong user? How are the recipients defined in the system for this notification?

Thanks,

Sneha

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0

Please let me know if its good now! Thanks.

 

I tried to add another button to add my own audio but could’t get a mp3 url without an account so I put same as app’s motivational music. It’s great to learn how audio can be preloaded and then used!

entry.title: Universal ID Problem with Linked Accounts
entry.content:
Dear All,

 

Can somebody please advise. I tried to book my SAP exam last night and I couldnt due to the system require me to link 2nd account to my Universal ID : message below

"Please note: to pass this exam and receive your certificate you need to have a SAP Universal ID setup with two linked email accounts! Please setup your SAP Universal ID and/or add your second email account now!
SAP Certified Associate - Business Process Integration with SAP S/4HANA
History"
I followed the link and added a new email, however, through it says the new email is linked, in the account it doesnt show so : it shows as not linked

I am absolutely stuck. Did somebody has similar issue and how can i resolve it?

 

Stella

entry.title: Re: Restful ABAP CDS metadata extension columns
entry.content:
In service definition, did you expose BASIC view or CONSUMPTION view?

If Basic view, then metadata will work only on basic view.

entry.title: Post currency adjustments
entry.content:
Dear colleagues, 

While testing Chapter 4.39 Post currency adjustments (F1606) of the test script J58 (for Germany) I encountered a problem. The test script advised to use USD as foreign transaction currency in the header. In the line items the script advised to use the account 11010000 and 22000000. For account 11010000 I used the F4 Help to find a house bank and house bank account. But finally I cannot post due to the error message "Page 1 Line Item 1:Transaction curr. USD differ from house bank curr. EUR posting not allowed". 

How can I solve this issue? Thank you in advance!  S. Zhou

entry.title: Re: Deep dive into Q4 2023, What’s New in SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation Blog Series
entry.content:
Hi David, 

Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We have updated the link, and you can now access the recordings: https://events.sap.com/cloud-alm-quarterly-updates/en/replays

Apologies for any inconvenience. Thank you for your understanding and continued support.

entry.title: Ability to Hide Unused Targets in SAP SuccessFactors Territory and Quota
entry.content:
On the Quotas tab of a territory, you can hide any targets that aren't relevant to a specific territory. When you hide a parent target, all child targets are automatically hidden, as well. You can unhide individual child targets, as needed.

Hidden targets aren't visible to managers and sales representatives on the Quota tab, the Quota Allocation screen, or the Quota breakdown screen.

To hide a quota target, complete the following procedure.

  1. In the application menu, navigate to Territory Admin >  Territory Programs and open the territory program for which you want to hide a quota target type.

    The territory program opens and the Territory Tree tab is displayed.

  2. For the desired territory, Navigate to Manage Quota tab > Select the Quotas tab.
  3. Select the (Hide) icon to hide the target.

    The Hide Management window appears as shown below.

     

  4. If you want to hide the currently selected territory, enable the toggle for Include Current Territory.
  5. If the territory program has derived target types, the Apply to Derived Targets toggle option is available. Enable the toggle to hide the dependent derived targets of the parent target type.
  6. For non leaf-level territories, select the appropriate checkboxes to Hide Rep and/or Hide Rollup territories.
  7. Choose Apply.

Once you've successfully hidden targets, if needed, you can unhide what you've hidden. To change what is hidden, choose  (Unhide).

To show everything, choose Reset and Apply. To stop hiding only certain elements, uncheck the appropriate boxes and choose Apply.

entry.title: Does having many replication flows increase compute/storage costs
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a question regarding compute/storage costs in terms of creating a replication flow that has one table and creating a replication flow that has several tables.

Which of these designs costs more, and is there an SAP guideline regarding creating replication flow? I see a lot of benefits in creating a replication flow per table.

 

thanks

entry.title: Re: Outlook Visit types to C4C
entry.content:
Hi Jens,

these categories in Outlook are leveraged to identify the synchronisation state of events. Therefore, these are pre-defined and cannot be changed.

Hope this helps?

Regards,

Andreas

entry.title: Re: Expectation is to get Time Taken in Net Work Days.Tim...
entry.content:
Hi @sachin1026 ,

There is not standard function to do this. You can write a logic to exclude Sat and Sun. 
Check out this response on this community question https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-analytics-cloud-count-only-the-business-days-in-date-difference/qaq-p/748578

Hope this Helps.

entry.title: Re: [BIG PROBLEM] SAP Host Agent cannot connect to SYSTEMDB
Re: SAP CAP - Add Header / Language Parameters at Runtime
entry.content:
what about when calling and external action/function via an EventContext.

Does it work setting the locale via action/function EventContext ?

eventContext.getParameterInfo.copy().setLocale(...)
service.emit(eventContext)

entry.title: Re: Portfolio Management – Enhanced Financial Planning integration
entry.content:
Hi @Karthik_Bhaskar , 

there are couple of prerequisites that need to be setup in the customizing, these are described in detail here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/plm/3363506068.html . Once you have these in place, the button should be there.

Regards, Andrea

entry.title: Re: Trailing 12 Month (TTM) Attrition %
entry.content:
Hi @sachin1026 ,

Thanks for taking the time to explain the use case, however I am still a little confused. 
You can check out the following blogs to see if this addresses your concerns:

  1. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/date-calculations-in-sap-analytics-cloud-using-custom-date/ba-p/13471779
  2. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/last-x-months-trend-for-a-given-month/ba-p/13428805

If these don't help, request you to share some screenshots to explain.

entry.title: Re: How to provision user identities into Concur using Identity Provisioning
entry.content:
Hello Iulia,

thank you for this very good walkthrough! 

The user provisioning works fine so far,
but one question regarding the write transformation remains. 

Can you tell how to specify the targetpath for concur targetsystem
if I want to create a User with the "EXP_APPROVER" Role already assigned?

According to the API Documentation of Concur
i tried 

{
"constant": "EXP_APPROVER",
"optional": true,
"targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:spend:2.0:Role']['roleName']"
},

or

{
"constant": "EXP_APPROVER",
"optional": true,
"targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:spend:2.0:Role']['roles']['roleName']"
},

However this does not do the trick and I get a schema error
Error":{"messages":[{"code":"BAD_INPUT","type":"error","schemaPath":"/urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:spend:2.0:Role","message":"Unsupported attribute"}

Can you tell how to define the target write transofrmation for assigning roles?

thank you very much,
best regards
Paul

_____
#IPS
#Concur
#Transformation

entry.title: Re: Services not visible in BAS S/4 Hana Public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi @saurabh_shukla4,

I propose that you double-check your settings as described in the documentation:

  • Create a Destination to Connect to SAP Business Application Studio: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/0af2819bbe064a3da455753c8518dd81.html?version=2402.502
  • Create a Communication System for SAP Business Application Studio: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/79ed4173a0e44a5085c2d236d14b5ab8.html?version=2402.502

Or double-check your setup with the https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-s4hanacloud-purchasereq-connect-bas.html tutorial.

If your setup seems fine, then you may run the Fiori Tools Environment Check in BAS (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIORI_tools/17d50220bcd848aa854c9c182d65b699/75390cf5d81e43aea5db231ef4225268.html) and/or create a connectivity trace using the Display Connectivity Trace app in your S/4HANA Cloud system (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/a4f6ccd072f147f299b1d856062c8dc8.html?version=2402.502). 

If the issue persists and you cannot solve the issue yourself, then create an incident on the BC-SRV-APS-EXT-BAS component.

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: BRF+ outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello all,

 

Is the outbound_delivery  available for  BRF+ output management?

 

The object outbound_delivery can be activated for BRF+, but the scenario can’t be found in Transaction OPD (BRF+ message types).

We downloaded the latest scenarios from https://me.sap.com/notes/2248229, but there is still no scenario for outbound delivery.

 

thx.

 

Br

Ralph

entry.title: Re: Empty Result Array Issue in Business Rules Service fo...
entry.content:
Please raise a ticket on BPI-PA-BPC component, and someone from the content Dev team will address the issue. We will need to look into your project to suggest you accordingly.

Regards,

Archana

entry.title: Re: [BIG PROBLEM] SAP Host Agent cannot connect to SYSTEMDB
entry.content:
I'm still interested to see the symptom. I understand, as you have provided, output of ListDatabases for saphostctrl have got some errors towards the end. At beginning, it's detecting HANA components alright. So I want to understand what it stops you doing.
If you cehck AgenAdmin on your Solution Manager system, is Host agent Green there: http(s)://<SolMan_FQDN>:5<Java_App_Instance_number><00_for_HTTP/01_for_HTTPS>/smd/AgentAdmin --> SAP Host Agent --> HANA FQDN under Agent name
How about Diagnostics agent: http(s)://<SolMan_FQDN>:5<Java_App_Instance_number><00_for_HTTP/01_for_HTTPS>/smd/AgentAdmin --> Agents --> HANA FQDN under Connected Agents - Full Host Name
Do you have outside discover setup by host agent or diagnostics agent? You can find that in your LMDB (on SolMan) --> Hosts --> HANA short hostname against Host Name --> Display --> besides Host Name, it will show "Supplied by Outside Discovery (SAP Host Agent)" if outside discovery by host agent is configured.
Moreover, if you have systems registering to SLD and from there going to LMDB, then you need to look at that as well.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 HANA International Trade-Intrastat declaratio...
entry.content:
Hi,

The sales organization is not relevant.

POI is always a combination of Company Code (BUKRS) and reporting country.
You can only assign the plants that are assigned to the company code.

entry.title: Re: Restful ABAP CDS metadata extension columns
entry.content: yes, I expose both

entry.title: Re: Deployment Error "ABAP language version is not suppor...
entry.content:
Hi @Fabian_J,

I guess that software component ZLOCAL is set up for ABAP for Cloud Development (https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/b5670aaaa2364a29935f40b16499972d/8da870021323498db15a1c56cfc9b302.html?version=202210.000). In that case, you cannot choose a different language version.

Are you testing against an S/4HANA Cloud, public edition system? In that case, the tutorial can be used.

Or are you testing against S/4HANA or S/4HANA Cloud, private edition? In that case:

  • The UI does not support the ABAP Cloud language version in the 2022 release (that would explain the error message). Please follow the https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-s4hanacloud-purchasereq-deploy-ui.html and https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-s4hanacloud-purchasereq-integrate-flp.html tutorial
  • UI supports the ABAP Cloud language version in the 2023 release. Please have a look at https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/b5670aaaa2364a29935f40b16499972d/f3a1527d38784f888ad1c235c5d33a43.html?version=202310.001. A tutorial for 2023 is work in progress.

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Re: RAP unmannaged scenario - Create Sales Order with EML
entry.content:
Try managed with additional save and convert PID to key in there using below syntax - 

CONVERT KEY OF r_salesordertp FROM lo_create_mapped TO DATA(ls_so_final_key).

 Just make sure to declare lo_create_mapped as a static variable in implementation class globally.

entry.title: Re: Transporting SAP Build Process Automation Projects
entry.content: We highly recommend to use transport management service. Any reason why customer does not want to use TMS ? export and import is also possible but Customer has to ensure that all the dependent artefacts and required version are imported accordingly.

entry.title: How to kill a hung or long running job in the SAP SuccessFactors Territory and Quota
entry.content:
Navigate to Territory Admin > Administration > Job Summary and choose the BackgroundJob Summary tab.

The following status types are displayed in the Status column of the Background Job Summary page:
  • Waiting: The job is staged to progress.
  • Processing: The job is in progress.
  • Success: The processed job is a success.
  • Failed: The processed job has failed.
Use the Cancel button to terminate jobs that are in Waiting and Processing status. When you attempt to cancel a job, the following can occur:

  • If the job you tried to cancel is hung and can't be completed successfully, the application kills the job and displays “The selected job has been cancelled successfully." in the notification banner.

  • If the job you tried to cancel is active and can be completed successfully, the application doesn't kill the job and displays “The selected job run cannot be cancelled, as it is actively running."

Note:The option to cancel is applicable for all types of background jobs within the application.

entry.title: valuation area not defined what should i Do for it
entry.content:
Valuation area  not defined

Message No. ME059

Valuation error

entry.title: Re: BOE 4.3 SP4 we need to find the exact location of a s...
entry.content:
If you just want to verify that the instance was migrated, why not just open it in Launchpad or CMC?  But if you really do need to find the file in the FRS, you can use a CMS query:

select si_name,si_update_ts,si_files from ci_infoobjects where  si_schedule_status = 1 and si_parentid = xxx

Replace xxx with the si_id of the parent report.  This will give you a list of all of the successful scheduled instances of the report -- just find the one that aligns to the date/time of the one you're looking for.

entry.title: Re: Change value of an attribute Inforecord Classification
entry.content:
Did you try

  1. To read current values with BAPI_OBJCL_GETDETAIL 
  2. call BAPI_OBJCL_CHANGE with concatenation of MATNR, an initial MATKL, LIFNR (or INFNR, MATNR,
    LIFNR) created with BAPI_OBJCL_CONCATENATEKEY
  3. ty to set a break-point at start of FM CACL_CLASSIFICATION_SAVE (and test with ME11)

entry.title: Re: We have just completed a 2023 FPS 01 upgrade - the FL...
entry.content:
You invalidated the Global Cache and ran the SAPUI5 index calculate report?  Also, if you are using a Custom Theme, try one of the standard themes from SAP.  If that works, the issue would be the need to rebuild your custom theme.  

Kevin

If so please explain the same.

entry.title: Re: BOE 4.3 SP4 we need to find the exact location of a s...

entry.title: Re: Asset Accounting in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Nice Explanation. 

I need a small help:

I can see in your blog that, during the asset acquisition two entries generated containing the technical clearing account with different number series.

1. 1900000000

2. 3100000001

In our organisation, similar entries are getting generated during the asset acquisition, how ever the document series is same. E.g. 1. 3200004350 and 2. 3200004475.

Due to the same document series, user are getting confused to identify the original entry and the tehnical clearing entry generted by system.Hence they want the separate number seires for the second entry.

Could you please let me know if we can do any configuration changes to generate different document seires for these entries.

Help from anyone is highly appreciated.

Regards,

Karthik

Best Regards

entry.title: Not able to delete SAP Business One License
entry.content:
Hi experts! I'm facing an issue when I try to delete a license on the portal.

I have a test system (soon to be deleted) with 3 SAP B1 Professional User licenses so the first thing i did was un-assign those licenses in SAP B1, then I logged into the portal to delete the record following the steps provided:

To delete an existing license key, check the box to the left of the line item and hit the trash can icon. Then click Generate to complete the action.

But I'm not sure what I'm doing wrong, after following these steps I get an error saying that a Professional User or Starter pack should be selected (please see the attached screenshots).

I can't move forward and in my understanding even if the license it's flagged for deletion is not and won't be deleted.

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: SAP CAP: Controller - Service - Repository architecture
entry.content:
Hi all,

Introduction

Many of us are leveraging SAP CAP (Node.js with TypeScript) for our projects.

While CAP provides an abstract mechanism to derive RESTful oData services given a CDS data model there's always room for more efficiency and improvement in the implementing communication between business logic, service, and persistence layer.

-

Blog series

1. CDS-TS-Dispatcher: Simplifying SAP CAP TypeScript Development 

2. CDS-TS-Repository: Simplify SAP CAP Entity persistance with BaseRepository

Crafted by developers for developers by ABS & DxFrontier team

-

Prerequisites

Before we dive in, you should have a basic understanding of CDS-TS-Dispatcher: Simplifying SAP CAP TypeScript Development 

 

Section 1: Introduction to Controller - Service - Repository - design pattern

This pattern provides a structured approach to organizing the various components of our SAP CAP applications, promoting modularity, scalability, and maintainability.

Each layer should be structured based on domain of responsabilities like : 

  • Controller - Responsible for managing the REST interface to the business logic implemented in Service
  • Service - Contains business logic implementations, the middleware between Controller and Repository.
  • Repository - This component is dedicated to handling entity manipulation operations by leveraging the power of CDS-QL.

Controller Service Repository design pattern

 

Section 2: Introduction to Controller (@EntityHandler) layer

Now we will create the Controller layer and for that we created a new class BookHandler which is annotated with the @EntityHandler(Book) decorator.

@EntityHandler decorator takes as an argument the Book entity, this will have effect on all event decorators like @BeforeRead(), @AfterRead() ..., all events will be executed exclusively for this Book entity.

 

 

@EntityHandler(Book)
class BookHandler {
  @Inject(SRV) private readonly srv: Service;
  @Inject(BookService) private readonly bookService: BookService;

  @AfterCreate()
  private async afterCreate(@Result() result: Book, @Req() req: Request): Promise<void> {
    this.bookService.validateData(result, req);
  }

  @BeforeRead()
  @Use(MiddlewareMethodBeforeRead)
  private async beforeRead(@Req() req: TypedRequest<Book>): Promise<void> {
    this.bookService.showConsoleLog();
  }

  @AfterRead()
  private async afterRead(
    @Req() req: Request,
    @Results() results: Book[],
    @SingleInstanceSwitch() singleInstance: boolean,
    @IsColumnSupplied<Book>('price') hasPrice: boolean,
    @IsPresent('SELECT', 'columns') hasColumns: boolean,
    @IsRole('Developer', 'AnotherRole') role: boolean,
    @GetRequest('locale') locale: Request['locale'],
   Promise<void> {
    await this.bookService.manageAfterReadMethods({ req, results, singleInstance });
  }

  @AfterUpdate()
  private async afterUpdate(@Result() result: Book, @Req() req: TypedRequest<Book>): Promise<void> {
    await this.bookService.addDefaultTitleText(result, req);
  }

  @AfterDelete()
  private async afterDelete(@Result() deleted: boolean, @Req() req: Request): Promise<void> {
    this.bookService.notifyItemDeleted(req, deleted);
  }
}

export default BookHandler;

 

 

@EntityHandler(Book) decorator will registers 5 events :

 

@AfterCreate() 
@BeforeRead() 
@AfterRead() 
@AfterUpdate() 
@AfterDelete()

 

 

Every decorator will create the corresponding event in the SAP CAP CDS event registration, this means that the callback of every decorator will be triggered when a REST (CRUD) Request is performed.

@BeforeRead() and @AfterRead() will be triggered when a new GET request is performed :

Example:  GET http://localhost:4004/odata/v4/catalog/Book

-

@Inject() dependencies

We inject the BookService class by using Dependendy injection and gaining visibility over all public methods created in the BookService class:

 

@Inject(BookService) private readonly bookService: BookService

 

 

Section 3: Introduction to Service (@Servicelogic) layer

In @ServiceLogic() will reside all of the customer business logic. This @ServiceLogic() will make a connection between @EntityHandler(Book) and @Repository() 

 

 

@ServiceLogic()
class BookService {
  @Inject(SRV) private readonly srv: Service;
  @Inject(BookRepository) private readonly bookRepository: BookRepository;

  // PRIVATE routines

  private async emitOrderedBookData(req: Request) {
    await this.srv.emit('OrderedBook', { book: 'dada', quantity: 3, buyer: req.user.id });
  }

  private notifySingleInstance(req: Request, singleInstance: boolean) {
    if (singleInstance) {
      req.notify('Single instance');
    } else {
      req.notify('Entity set');
    }
  }

  private enrichTitle(results: Book[]) {
    results.map((book) => (book.title += ` -- 10 % discount!`));
  }

  // PUBLIC routines

  public async manageAfterReadMethods(args: { req: Request; results: Book[]; singleInstance: boolean }) {
    await this.emitOrderedBookData(args.req);
    this.notifySingleInstance(args.req, args.singleInstance);
    this.enrichTitle(args.results);
  }

  public notifyItemDeleted(req: Request, deleted: boolean) {
    req.notify(`Item deleted : ${deleted}`);
  }

  public showConsoleLog() {
    console.log('****************** Before read event');
  }

  public validateData(result: Book, req: Request) {
    if (result.currency_code === '') {
      return req.reject(400, 'Currency code is mandatory!');
    }
  }

  public async addDefaultTitleText(result: Book, req: TypedRequest<Book>) {
    await this.bookRepository.update({ ID: req.data.ID }, { title: 'Dracula' });
  }

  public async verifyStock(req: ActionRequest<typeof submitOrder>) {
    const { book, quantity } = req.data;
    const bookFound = await this.bookRepository.findOne({ ID: book! });

    if (quantity != null) {
      if (quantity < 1) {
        return req.reject(400, `quantity has to be 1 or more`);
      }

      // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/strict-boolean-expressions
      if (!bookFound) {
        return req.error(404, `Book #${book} doesn't exist`);
      }

      if (bookFound.stock !== null && quantity > bookFound.stock!) {
        return req.reject(409, `${quantity} exceeds stock for book #${book}`);
      }

      await this.bookRepository.update(bookFound, {
        stock: (bookFound.stock! -= quantity),
      });
    }
    await this.srv.emit('OrderedBook', { book, quantity, buyer: req.user.id });

    return { stock: bookFound!.stock };
  }
}

export default BookService;

 

 

Section 4: Introduction to Repository (@Repository) layer

This BaseRepository will provide out-of-the-box functionalities like: 

  • .create(): Create new records in the table.
  • .update(): Updates a new record in the table.
  • .createMany(): Creates many records in the table.
  • .findAll(): Retrieve all records from the table.
  • .find(): Query the database to find specific data.
  • .delete(): Remove records from the database.
  • .exists(): Check the existence of data in the table.
  • ... and many more actions

 

 

@Repository()
class BookRepository extends BaseRepository<Book> {
  constructor() {
    super(Book);
  }
  // ... define custom CDS-QL actions if BaseRepository ones are not satisfying your needs !
}

export default BookRepository;

 

 

In the @Repository() we've utilizied the BaseRepository by extending the BookRepository class with CDS-TS-Repository will give us access to the most common CDS-QL actions.

You can find additional documentation for BaseRepository at CDS-TS-Repository GitHub

 

Conclusion

In conclusion, CDS-TS-Dispatcher combined with CDS-TS-Repository is a powerful tool that can speed up your SAP CAP TypeScript projects by eliminating repetitive code and being a better fit for common team architecture setups.

 

Additional Resources

Find an example of usage of the CDS-TS-Samples GitHub

entry.title: Re: Set header in api managment flow request
entry.content: Hi Sven, When we apply header in Assign message policy, it works only in success scenarios. Can you let us know why the header is not visible in success scenaiors?

entry.title: Re: Repeat key members in a Fiori DataGrid ?
entry.content: Hi Victor, found it! https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/cds-analytical-query-result-in-fiori-app-with-quot-repating-member-quot-not/qaq-p/12779249

entry.title: Save large volume of PO's in PDF form
entry.content:
I am trying to find a way to save a large volume of purchase orders into pdf form without going one by one.

Let's say I have a list of 100 purchase orders. At the moment I must, one by one, print the PO document that we send to the vendor by pdf form, choose the disc where the file will be stored in, and manually name it.

The goal would be to select the whole list, print the PO's not the list into pdf form, automatically save them to my local disc and name each one out of their "45xxxx" document number.

Please note I don't have access to ABAP editor

Thanks for helping!

entry.title: Dynamic Approver based on dynamic task determination.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We are looking forward to implement SAP Build Process Automation.

We want to trigger the SBPA using event based trigger perhaps not clear about handling the dynamic flow of tasks and approvers. As a tasks can have any number of task level and each level will have a dynamic approver . 

Please help me in implementing this using Build Automation . Do i need to use CAPM application to get the tasks and approvers details or can i handle it using business rules if so then how it can be achieved using business rules and actions. Please advise.

entry.title: Is it possible to use a technical user in Workflow conditions?
entry.content:
Hi, everyone

Is it possible to use in workflow conditions SAP technical user?

My Workflow wasn`t started and see this activity.

Example:

I have a Contract that was changed via SDK and has "Changed by" field = technical user (SAP_SYSTEM)

And I've created the workflow to update field if contract was "changed by" matches pattern "SAP" name.

But this WF isn't started. So Do we can`t use technical user in conditions?

And I created a workflow to update the field if the contract was "changed by" a user with a name containing "SAP".     Additionally, I`ve tried to use condition "Changed by ID" - but in this case system ask to choose user from the list of business users and I can`t choose technical user here. So I use condition "Changed by"

But this WF does not start. Isn't it possible to use a technical user in workflow conditions?

entry.title: error
entry.content:
Hi all 

I am facing this error can you solve this error

entry.title: Re: error
entry.content: I need solving problem

entry.title: Re: How to delete the deleted operation from routing PLPO...
entry.content:
Hi,

Try with CEWB, operation as working area.

Regards

entry.title: Re: How to reproduce CO16N?
entry.content:
hi alex...

Is maybe the main question: Why you have such Error Messages when you want to post something ?

Maybe you run these programs in a job periodicaly CORUPROC   or/and CORUAFW0  

Possible solutions:   do your Z* Postings when the job is not running , or do it like SAP MEINT: work with an QUEUE and do a automatic retry if the Baipi Returns with an Error.

 

Robert

entry.title: Re: Easy way to find S4HANA CDS views for Functional Consultants!!
entry.content: Thanks for sharing

entry.title: PO form (Import) - Tax Number not flowing to XML & CDS
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In PO form, we tried to print the Tax Number of Import Suppliers from countries, But the Tax Numbers are not flowing to XML and I_Supplier CDS view. 

This issue is only for BP master maintained with other countries & other Tax Categories.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: PO form (Import) - Tax Number not flowing to XML & CDS
entry.content:
Hi,

The tax ID can be fetched through one of the API "API_BUSINESS_PARTNER "

Please refer to: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3c916ef10fc240c9afc594b346ffaf77/85043858ea0f9244e10000000a4450e5.html?version=2402.502

API Business Hub:https://api.sap.com/api/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/overview

Also see the request on the customer influence portal https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/228379

There is a PO Output form in place where the customers can design it so that the tax information is printed only for certain suppliers. Please note:

For help with configuration, how-to, and implementation issues, please visit the appropriate self-service resources listed in the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2706322. Alternately, speak with your Account Executive or Customer Engagement Executive about Professional Services options or about engaging an SAP Authorized Partner about customisations.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Happy Earth Day!
entry.content: Enjoy your greenery today and every day!

entry.title: Error 'Serial number &1 already exists for material &2' in MIGO when doing movement type 309.
entry.content:
When using the app Post Goods Movement ( MIGO ) , we get an error Serial number &1 already exists for material &2

 

If one serial number is used for a material, and the same serial number is assigned to another material, how to change the error to a warning instead ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error 'Serial number &1 already exists for material &...
entry.content:
A serial number master data (the one you can see in the app Display Material Serial Number - IQ03) refers to a specific physical item and is identified by a unique material/serial number combination. It has its very own history, stock data, system status, etc., and is independent from other another serial number master data. 

 

If you do a movement 309 posting with a serial number with a different from/destination material number, it means that this physical item should get a new material number (e. g. because the item was re-worked or enhanced). Consequently the system tries to update the material number in the serial number master data that represents the physical item. 

 

If there is already another serial number master data with the combination serial number/destination material number, the 309 posting isn't possible because you would end up with two master data with an identical serial/material number combination. You would need to archive the "second" serial number first (or change its serial number or material number in the app Change Material Serial Number, menu function "Edit" - "Special serial no. functions" - "Change serial no." or "Change material number...").

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm a Software Enginner Very much looking forward to get to know people within this group and share knowledge and insights.

Best,
Malek

entry.title: A New Certificate Validity Metric to Keep You Updated on Expiring Certificates in the Neo Environmen
entry.content:
SAP Monitoring service now offers a new Certificate Validity metric for Java applications in the Neo environment, which allows you to keep track of expiring certificates. This way the service can notify you when your client and CA certificates are about to expire so that you can take the necessary steps to renew them.

By default, the service monitors client certificates and sets the default metric for the client certificate whose expiration period is the shortest from today. If the certificate has expired, the metric will then show a value 0 days to expiration. In such a case, it’d be better if you clean up such expired certificates so that you can keep track of the ones that are still used.

Furthermore, it’s possible that the Java application has not loaded any certificates for monitoring. In such a case, the Certificate Validity metric shows the value -1 days to expiration. For more information about the default metric, how to create a custom one, and how to customize the list of allowed certificates, see Certificate Validity Metric.

In addition, this metric uses Warning and Critical thresholds to notify you that your certificate is about to expire. By default, the Warning threshold is defined as 14 days before the expiration, and the Critical one is set as 7 days before the expiration. However, you can also customize these thresholds to match with your custom needs. See Manage Thresholds for Default Checks of a Java Application.

Try out the new Certificate Validity metric for Java applications in the Neo environment and share how it works for you.

We’ll be happy to hear your feedback and experience while using this functionality. Any points for improvement are also appreciated.

entry.title: Re: MB51 report
entry.content:
Hi 

 

In this you need to select the current display varinat and add cost center like below example. I have marked both in yellow 

 

Regards

Rashid Khan
